ddls:
CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_number" TEXT /* Identification number of the unit */,
  "unit_type" TEXT /* Type of the unit (e.g., 20TK, 23TK) */,
  "compound_position" TEXT /* Compound position reference of the unit */,
  "move_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the unit was last moved */,
  "client_address" TEXT /* Address of the client associated with the unit */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the unit (e.g., in transit, stored, maintenance) */,
  "last_known_location" TEXT /* Last known location of the unit (e.g., GPS coordinates) */,
  "next_destination" TEXT /* Next destination of the unit */,
  "estimated_arrival_time" TEXT /* Estimated time of arrival at the next destination */,
  "current_client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client currently associated with the unit */,
  "unit_weight" TEXT /* Weight of the unit */,
  "unit_volume" TEXT /* Volume of the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_units_current_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("current_client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_units_client_address FOREIGN KEY ("client_address") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the client */,
  "client_type" TEXT /* Type of client (e.g., shipper, consignee) */,
  "client_status" TEXT /* Status of the client (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "company_size" TEXT /* Size of the client's company (e.g., small, medium, large) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the client (e.g., manufacturing, retail) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unit_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit type (e.g., 20TK, 23TK) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit type */,
  "max_weight" TEXT /* Maximum weight the unit can carry */,
  "max_volume" TEXT /* Maximum volume the unit can hold */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the unit (length, width, height) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compound_positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compound position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the compound position */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the compound position */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., warehouse, port, depot) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the compound position (number of units it can hold) */,
  "current_occupancy" INTEGER /* Current number of units in the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movements" (
  "movement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movement record */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit being moved */,
  "movement_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the movement */,
  "previous_position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the previous compound position */,
  "current_position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current compound position */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the movement (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  "transport_mode" TEXT /* Mode of transport (e.g., truck, ship, train) */,
  "estimated_duration" INTEGER /* Estimated duration of the movement */,
  "actual_duration" INTEGER /* Actual duration of the movement */,
  "distance" TEXT /* Distance of the movement (in kilometers or miles) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movements_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client associated with the address */,
  "address_details" TEXT /* Details of the address */,
  "address_type" TEXT /* Type of address (e.g., shipping, billing) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the address */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province of the address */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the address */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip or postal code of the address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_addresses_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., logistics manager, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Date and time of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "sent_time" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., read, unread) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the notification (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., movement summary, inventory report) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, pending) */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last modified date of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
